title: Pack of 40 Mixed M3.5 Screws 35mm, 40mm,50mm and 75mm Long Assorted Electrical Machine Screw for Light Switch and Plug Sockets Bright Zinc Plated DIY Plated Slotted Head
features: M3.5 Electrical Machine Screw Kit: Universal Fit for Sockets & Switches
Pack contains 10 x 35mm, 10 x 40mm, 10 x 50mm and 10 x 75mm M3.5 Screws
For replacing screws which no longer reach the back box due to tiling, plastering and more
Chrome plated finish long length screws for fixing electrical front plates to the back box.
Please Note that the 75mm Screws May Come As Zinc Platted Or Nickle Platted And Therefore May Vary In Colour To The Other Screws
